task_completion.description: Navigate to the Saved Replies settings for the 'IT Support' mailbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the FreeScout interface, specifically the settings or manage section for the 'IT Support' mailbox, with the 'Saved Replies' tab or menu selected.

task_completion.description: Open the existing 'Password Reset Instructions' saved reply for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks on or opens the edit screen for the existing saved reply named 'Password Reset Instructions'.

task_completion.description: Change the name of the saved reply to 'SSO Password Reset Guide'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' or 'Title' input field in the saved reply edit screen contains the exact text 'SSO Password Reset Guide'.

task_completion.description: Update the body content with the new SSO instructions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main text editor area contains the new instructions, specifically showing the URL 'sso.company.com/reset', the phrase 'at least 12 characters', and the sign-off 'IT Support Team'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the outdated legacy URL is removed from the body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor area no longer contains the string 'legacy.internal.corp/reset'.
A success notification (e.g., 'Saved successfully') is visible, or the agent returns to the Saved Replies list showing 'SSO Password Reset Guide' as an entry.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeScout web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Interactions occur within a web browser navigating http://localhost:8080, rather than using terminal commands, curl, or database scripts to modify the reply.

integrity.description: The agent edited the existing reply instead of creating a new one alongside the old one.
integrity.visual_evidence: In the final list of saved replies, there is only 'SSO Password Reset Guide'. The old 'Password Reset Instructions' is no longer present, confirming it was edited and not duplicated.

integrity.description: The agent entered the text into the actual FreeScout application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text updates are visible inside the FreeScout web form fields (Name and Body), not just typed into a local text editor or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in FreeScout, a web-based help desk. The agent must edit an existing saved reply in the 'IT Support' mailbox. Old name: 'Password Reset Instructions'. New name: 'SSO Password Reset Guide'. The updated body MUST contain 'sso.company.com/reset', 'at least 12 characters', and 'IT Support Team'. The updated body MUST NOT contain the outdated URL 'legacy.internal.corp/reset'.
